apply: Use the correct form of tense in a sentence to convey the intended meaning.
Change the voice of a sentence from active to passive or vice versa.
Use the correct form of tense and voice in a paragraph.
analyze: Identify the tense and voice used in a given sentence or paragraph.
Analyze a text to identify the author's use of tense and voice.
Compare and contrast the use of tense and voice in different texts.
remember: Recall the forms of present, past, and future tenses in English.
Identify the correct forms of simple, continuous, and perfect tenses in English.
List the types of voice (active and passive) and their uses.
understand: Explain the concept of tense and voice in English grammar.
Describe the difference between simple, continuous, and perfect tenses in English.
Explain the use of active and passive voice in English.

ncert_objectives: Students will be able to identify and explain the correct use of tenses in English.
Students will be able to use the correct form of voice in sentences and paragraphs.
Students will be able to analyze and interpret texts to identify the use of tense and voice.
board_exam_objectives: Identify the correct form of tense in a given sentence.
Change the voice of a sentence from active to passive or vice versa.
Use the correct form of tense and voice in a paragraph to convey the intended meaning.
